login.headline: Track the best flight deals automatically.
login.tagline: Set your routes, define a price threshold and we'll alert you the moment a cheap seat appears.
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
login.accountDeleted: Your account has been permanently deleted. Sorry to see you go.

register.headline: Never miss a cheap flight again.
register.tagline: Create an account and start monitoring routes. We check prices every hour so you don't have to.
register.subtitle: Start tracking cheap flights in minutes
register.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgotPassword.headline: Locked out? No problem.
forgotPassword.tagline: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password. The link is valid for one hour.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address for your account and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.checkInboxSubtitle: If {{email}} is registered, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.

resetPassword.headline: Choose a new password.
resetPassword.tagline: Pick something strong and unique. You'll be signed in straight away after resetting.
resetPassword.invalidLinkSubtitle: This reset link is missing or malformed. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.passwordUpdatedSubtitle: Your password has been changed successfully. Redirecting you to sign in…
resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

search.title: Search flights
search.subtitle: Select your departure and return date — we'll show all flights and suggest nearby cheaper alternatives
search.flightsAlreadyAvailable: Flights are already available on this route

savedSearches.title: Saved searches
savedSearches.subtitle: Routes you're tracking. Set a target price when saving a search to get alerted when fares drop below it.
savedSearches.emptyHint: Use the {{link}} option on the Search page to save a route.
savedSearches.noMatch: No searches match the current filter.
savedSearches.deleteError: Failed to delete the search. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Set your defaults — they'll pre-fill the search form automatically.
profile.defaultDepartureHint: Pre-fills the “From” field on every new search.
profile.travelGroupHint: Pre-fills the passenger count on every new search.
profile.childrenHint: Under 16 — enter date of birth to verify age category
profile.appearanceHint: Choose how El Cheapo looks to you.
profile.languageHint: Choose the display language for the app.
profile.dangerZoneHint: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
profile.adminCannotDelete: Admin accounts cannot be deleted. Revoke your admin rights in the admin panel first.
profile.deleteEmailSent: Check your email for a confirmation link to complete the deletion.
profile.errorMissingDob: Please fill in a date of birth for each child.
profile.errorFutureDob: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
profile.adminStatusHint: Admins can access the admin panel and manage users.

deleteAccount.title: Delete your account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data — saved searches, alert history, and profile settings. This cannot be undone.

admin.title: Admin
admin.panelSubtitle: Scheduler logs, users, and manual controls
admin.noLogsYet: No scheduler logs yet. Run the check or wait for the hourly job.

flightList.noFlightsHint: No flights found for this route on the selected date. Check the price suggestions below for nearby dates.

priceSuggestions.title: Price comparison ±3 days
priceSuggestions.totalNote: Total = cheapest outbound + cheapest return on each date pair

common.serverUnavailable: The server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
common.connectionError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
common.pleaseEnterValidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
